## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org)
- [ ] `make lint typecheck test` passes locally
- [ ] No new user-facing medical/clinical/alarm language (see Master Plan §2)
- [ ] Docs / `PROGRESS.md` updated if this completes milestone criteria
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or private media committed
